text: Being here, I feel an intriguing sense of curiosity and anticipation. The first image, with its glass-walled meeting room and empty chairs, invites contemplation about collaboration and shared human progress—the formal structure hinting at both possibility and formality. The second image, bursting with color and bold "R+D" typography, feels like an exhibition of ideas and innovations. The words and images on display provoke me to reflect on the nature of research, development, and the evolution of human thought. I feel quietly inspired, yet also aware of the complex balance between structure and creativity that defines such spaces.
